LinkedIn Ads.description: Professional network, high conversion rate for B2B but higher cost.

Google Search Ads.description: Intent-driven search, excellent for both B2B and B2C.

Meta Ads (FB/IG).description: Visual platforms, great reach and engagement for B2C and community events.

Tech Newsletters.description: Niche audiences, high quality leads for developer and technology events.

TikTok Ads.description: Short-form video, high reach and low cost for youth/consumer demographics.

Email Marketing.description: Own list re-engagement, very high ROI and low cost per sign-up.

Local Event Listings.description: Meetup, Eventbrite, and local sites, good for localized B2C/community events.
